## Problem

What grammar/API/tooling scenario is currently hard to express?

## Proposal

Describe the suggested change and expected user-facing benefit.

## API / Grammar Impact

- Public API impact (new/changed `peg.*` function or option):
- Grammar syntax impact (new/changed annotation/operator/rule style):
- Backward-compatibility impact:

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives and trade-offs.
